Ajaya Dahal

Computer Engineering - Bachelors Major
Graduating Dec 01, 2021 (Currently Seeking Bachelors)
Experienced tutor with a demonstrated history of working in the higher education industry. Skilled in Circuit Design, Python, Java, C++, and Arduino. Strong education professional with in-progress bachelor’s in computer engineering focused in Robotics Technology/Technician. Zonal Winner of robotics championship organized by NRC India 2015. Actively involved in robotics and AI projects for past 6 years. An international "junior-level" student with high ambition to learn and share technical knowledge with potential employer company. Actively seeking a summer internship position for computer engineering, robotics/automation, AI method programming, electrical engineering, circuit design, software developing, or any technical field where there is no limit in learning.
